channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important We try our best to have security releases of Drupal Core within 24-72 hours of being made available on drupal.org. Release Created Date Description 4.0.0-rc2 2020-11-26T05:30:44Z Features/Updates: Update Drupal Core to 9.0.9 SA-core-2020-013 Update for WxT Corrected issue with install and assert.exception = On Corrected issue with Claro and Chrome 87+ Corrected issue with blocks not appearing related to context_defintions Added new optional extension wxt_ext_archived Upgrade path:
